credentials.name: Slack Bot Token
credentials.description: Slack Bot User OAuth Token (xoxb-...) from your Slack app
credentials.instructions:
1. Create a Slack app at https://api.slack.com/apps
2. Add bot scopes: chat:write, reactions:write, reactions:read, pins:write, pins:read, channels:history, users:read, emoji:read
3. Install the app to your workspace
4. Copy the Bot User OAuth Token (xoxb-...)

validation.message: Must be a valid Slack bot token (starts with 'xoxb-')
